title: 2PC Electrical Mains Voltage Tester Electricians Insulated Screwdriver
features: The BlueSpot 2 Piece Voltage Tester Screwdrivers is specially designed to determine the presence or absence of an electric voltage in electrical equipment. The slotted blade and convenient screwdriver-type handle ensure excellent mobility in confined spaces. Test range: 100v - 250v. TÜV / GS approved.

Specially designed to determine the presence or absence of an electric voltage in electrical equipment Slotted blade and convenient screwdriver-type handle ensure excellent mobility in confined spaces
Package Contents 3 x 140mm slotted voltage tester screwdriver. 3.5 x 190mm slotted voltage tester screwdrive
description: Product Description High hardness and good electrical conductivity A popular multi-test screwdriver. The Terminator can carry out simple safety checks, i.e. domestic appliances, no contact current detector and mains tester, can also track cables, test fuses and bulbs and polarity Maintenance electrical measurement / screwdriver assist Humanized clip design for easy electrical maintenance and portability Fully insulated anti-fall material, durable and improved safety performance Self-checking LED high-brightness bulbs: high-brightness works smoothly and is still clearly visible in the sun Uses: can be used in electronic factories, electrical appliances, car maintenance, household, etc., widely used Product function: 1. Neutral line/live line detection: the test result LED red light and green light indicate live line, green light indicates neutral line 2. Detection along the line: LED light on means the line is unblocked, LED light off means the line is disconnected 3. Wire switch: if the plug and the inner core of the wire are intact, the light will be on, and if it is not on, it means that the core wire is in poor contact
